title: [Complete] Maintenance - 2026 July 1
author: MSW_Creators
summary: MapleStory Worlds completed July 1 maintenance at 18:00 PDT after a three-hour platform outage. Version 26.5.5 added a Player Ban capability to World Insight, stabilized servers, and delivered editor, text rendering, state synchronization, and TeleportService fixes.

sections.title: Completed maintenance
items: The outage ran July 1 from 15:00 to 18:00 PDT; the website and PC and mobile apps were unavailable.
Published distributions: Windows 26.5.5.717, Mac 26.5.5.78, Android 26.5.5.611, and iOS 26.5.5.545.

sections.title: Creator platform changes
items: World Insight gained a Player Ban feature that lets creators implement account-based sanctions inside a World.
Sanction history can transfer when a sanctioned player deletes and later recreates a MapleStory Worlds account.
The update also fixed custom-font, TextSpriteSet, StateComponent, Model Editor, Background editor, and TeleportService issues.
